title: Moonlit Broker
description: An RPG-style Fabric mod with a mysterious merchant, milestone bounties, and a multi-currency trade progression—plus legendary contract-bound katanas.
body:
🌙 Moonlit Broker

An RPG-style Fabric mod that adds a mysterious merchant, a contract-bound katana system, and a tiered economy progression.

✨ Core Features

Mysterious Merchant NPC with a tiered trade system (Top / Shelf / Spark)

Contract-bound legendary katanas with unique combat effects

Bounty hunting & milestone progression

Multi-currency economy loop (Silver Notes / Trade Scrolls / Bounty Contracts / Mysterious Coins)

Multiplayer-friendly: server-authoritative validation & anti-duplication trade logic

✅ Requirements

Minecraft: 1.21.1

Fabric Loader: 0.15.11+

Fabric API: 0.116.8+1.21.1

Java: 21

📦 Installation

Install Fabric Loader + Fabric API

Drop the mod .jar into:

.minecraft/mods/

Launch the game.

🧾 Notes

This file is the full playable build with complete in-game textures.

The GitHub repository is code-open / asset-closed by design (placeholder textures are used there).

🐛 Known Issues / Feedback

If you encounter missing textures, crashes, or balance issues, please report it in the Issues page (or comments).
